title: Trend-Motor Duzeltme Turu -- Stage 0 pre-registration
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any re-measurement is run and BEFORE any D-186 result is seen. The NET DECISION RULE (DEC-044) is FROZEN here and will NOT be relaxed post-hoc (no 'disinflation -> full-period', no threshold lowering). Validation round (like D-181/D-184): same variants/rules/snapshot/trades; ONLY the measurement methodology changes. N<=3 preserved -- no new edge search.
what_changes_vs_d185: ONLY the metrics: (1) real portfolio drawdown replaces full-capital-cumprod artifact; (2) XU100-relative (+ best-effort real-CPI) returns replace nominal; (3) fair random null (matched exit + pre-filter) + cross-sectional-corrected significance replace the asymmetric null + IID/NW-only.
what_stays_identical: Same 3 variants A/B/C, same parabolic on/off, same trend_config frozen params, same frozen OHLCV snapshot (content_hash d1423f89), same trades from trend_backtest.backtest_variant. Look-ahead guard (D-185 clean) preserved. Survivors-only (88 tickers) -> still an upper bound.

fix1_real_drawdown.problem: D-185 sequential_equity_max_dd compounded each trade at FULL capital (cumprod) -> total_net_return ~1e+26, max_dd~0.99 deterministic; zero real risk signal.
fix1_real_drawdown.slot_contention: admit earliest (entry_date, then ticker alphabetical); excess skipped and COUNTED (no silent drop)
fix1_real_drawdown.drawdown: real peak-to-trough on the daily equity curve (bounded 0..1); expected ~0.2-0.4 not ~0.99

fix2_drift_free_returns.xu100_relative_definition: rel_net = (1 + gross_return) / (1 + xu100_return[entry_date..exit_date]) - 1 - cost_frac (geometric excess over index)

real_cpi.rule: frozen only if EVDS_API_KEY present; if absent, XU100-relative decides alone (directive 'REEL veya RELATIVE')

fix2_drift_free_returns.per_slice_null: random null computed PER inflation slice (D-185 used a single global null) to isolate drift
fix2_drift_free_returns.intentional_tightening_note: XU100-relative DISINFLATION numbers will be LOWER than D-185 nominal -- this is EXPECTED and INTENTIONAL, not an error: the index itself rises, so relative measures only excess-over-index ('how much you beat the market'). The decision rule is deliberately hard. The report states this upfront.

fair_null.problem: D-185 random null held a FIXED duration with NO stop, while the strategy used stop+trailing -> edge conflated entry-timing with exit-management.
fair_null.exit_symmetry: random entries get the SAME exit machinery: initial stop = entry - 1.5*ATR(14), Donchian-20 trailing (ratchet up), MAX_HOLD = 126 days
fair_null.prefilter_symmetry: random entries respect the SAME active pre-filter as the cell: ADV universe ALWAYS; parabolic-eligibility mask when parabolic_on (only non-parabolic-blocked day-ticker pairs). parabolic_off cells: ADV only. -> isolates the TRIGGER/RETEST timing, not the parabolic filter.

cross_sectional_significance.method: aggregate trades into a DAILY portfolio-return series (same-day trades collapse to one daily return -> cross-sectional same-day clustering resolved by aggregation), then block-bootstrap
cross_sectional_significance.no_driscoll_kraay: not needed -- daily aggregation handles the cross-sectional clustering that D-185 HAC-lag-5 missed; D-185 IID bootstrap (ignored block=21) is replaced by block bootstrap

net_decision_rule_DEC044.passes_if: at least one variant (C strongest candidate), in XU100-relative returns, vs the FAIR null (stop+trailing+pre-filter matched), in the DISINFLATION slice (2024-07-01..2026-04-30), with cross-sectional-corrected significance, beats the random null at >= 0.95 percentile AND real portfolio max_dd <= 0.35
net_decision_rule_DEC044.fails_if: edge vanishes at this intersection -> trend-motor is also weak in this universe/window (like Faz 0 cross-sectional) -> both paradigms tested (information, not failure)
net_decision_rule_DEC044.no_post_hoc_relaxation: this rule is frozen; not loosened after seeing results

n_lock.rule: N<=3 variants, same rules/params as D-185; only measurement methodology changes. No new variant/rule/parameter. Post-hoc parameter sweeping forbidden.

outputs: docs/trend_test/d186_results.json (after run: variant x filter x slice x [relative,real] x fair-null x real-DD)
docs/research/D-186-trend-duzeltme-rapor.md (DEC-044 verdict + Katman A recommendation or premise re-think)
